headline: Anthropic's Mythos model family anchored the month as efficiency pulled ahead of the agentic tooling stack.
body: Efficiency led the window with the strongest momentum, while the tooling cluster of browser automation, multi-session workflows, mixed-provider routing, scoped skills, MCP, LSP, and subagents lagged or weakened. The clearest product driver was Anthropic's Mythos release with Fable 5, included at no extra cost on paid plans through June 22, demonstrated autonomously playing Factorio, simulating the solar system to predict eclipses, syncing fluid simulation to remixed Beethoven, and building a CAD editor [1][4][5][6][7][8]. On the infrastructure side, throughput scaling and CPU offloading broke out as new entrants, and RunPod's Flash showed single-decorator IDE-to-GPU deployment [2]. RAG was reframed as a broader retrieval paradigm rather than vector search alone [9].
